notes: The game detected some of my Steam Controller's inputs twice. This is fixed by turning off a duplicated gamepad in the game's settings. Afterwards, it works without issues.
title: ZeroRanger

notes: Works without problems with controller support (tested with xboxOne and SNES controller) after disabling Esync, which prevents the game to crash a few minutes in.
title: ZeroRanger

notes: Everything works fine out of the box. I did not test with a controller (it seems others had problems).
title: ZeroRanger

notes: Runs out of the box with full controller support. Changing screen orientation may knock the game out of fullscreen and place window slightly outside monitor range; simply press Alt+Enter a couple of times to fix it.
title: ZeroRanger
